assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Neo4j ↔ Postgres Consistency Product consistency should have test products in both Postgres and Neo4j
assertionResults.title: should have test products in both Postgres and Neo4j

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Neo4j ↔ Postgres Consistency Product consistency should have matching product IDs across databases
assertionResults.title: should have matching product IDs across databases

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Neo4j ↔ Postgres Consistency Organisation consistency should have test organisations in Neo4j
assertionResults.title: should have test organisations in Neo4j

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Neo4j ↔ Postgres Consistency Organisation consistency should have matching org data via API (org lives in Neo4j)
assertionResults.title: should have matching org data via API (org lives in Neo4j)

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Neo4j ↔ Postgres Consistency Product-Organisation relationships should have BELONGS_TO relationships in Neo4j
assertionResults.title: should have BELONGS_TO relationships in Neo4j

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Neo4j ↔ Postgres Consistency Product-Organisation relationships manufacturer products should all belong to manufacturer org
assertionResults.title: manufacturer products should all belong to manufacturer org

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Neo4j ↔ Postgres Consistency Product-Organisation relationships importer products should belong to importer org
assertionResults.title: importer products should belong to importer org

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Neo4j ↔ Postgres Consistency API consistency across data stores product list should match Neo4j product count for org
assertionResults.title: product list should match Neo4j product count for org

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Neo4j ↔ Postgres Consistency API consistency across data stores org member count from API should match Postgres
assertionResults.title: org member count from API should match Postgres

assertionResults.fullName: Integration: Neo4j ↔ Postgres Consistency Dependency data consistency should have consistent SBOM data between stores
assertionResults.title: should have consistent SBOM data between stores

assertionResults.title: should have the expected fields on each step

assertionResults.title: should mark step 2 (set CRA category) complete for the seeded github product
